prompt: Create a warm, photorealistic luxury vanity flat-lay scene on a glossy white marble dressing table with gold trim in soft morning sunlight. The main subject is a set of exactly 3 printed photo items standing upright on the tabletop: 1 large white-bordered portrait print tilted left showing an elegant young woman in a cream blazer and delicate necklace, with her face intentionally covered by a smooth rectangular blur; 1 narrow vertical white photo-booth strip in the center containing exactly 3 stacked portraits of the same woman in the same cream outfit, each separated by thick white dividers and each face softly anonymized with a rectangular blur; and 1 large white-bordered portrait print tilted right showing the same woman with bare shoulder and hand near her neck, also with a rectangular face blur. Use cream white clothing, dark hair tied back, soft natural skin tones, editorial fashion photography lighting, shallow depth of field, and crisp paper edges with subtle shadows. Surround the prints with exactly 4 visible accessory groups: a champagne satin fabric drape on the left and rear, a gold bracelet with pearl-like charms on the left, a gold bracelet or pendant jewelry piece on the right, and a white coffee cup on a saucer beside stacked fashion magazines in the upper right. Background includes a bright window, a softly blurred mirror, and a calm elegant bedroom or dressing-room atmosphere. Color palette: ivory, beige, champagne, white marble, warm gold, and soft sunlight. No readable text, no watermark, no extra photo prints, keep the face areas anonymized and smooth.
